title: knautia drymeja subsp. tergestina
intro: Knautia drymeja subsp. tergestina is a sub-species of the Knautia drymeja plant, commonly known as the red deadnettle or summer knapweed, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Knautia drymeja subsp. tergestina include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
